top_signals.title: Palantir's Karp says businesses are 'unhappy' with the frontier AI labs
top_signals.summary: Palantir CEO Alex Karp says AI will drive the most important political decisions in the U.S. and shouldn't be decided by party lines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin miner margins fall to record low: Will BTC’s $60K floor hold?
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin miner profits recently fell to record lows, while Bitcoin struggles to hold the $60,000 floor. Should traders be worried?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Everton ‘surprised and angered’ at losing £40m legal case with Burnley
top_signals.summary: Everton have blasted the decision to order them to pay a reported £40m after losing a landmark legal battle with Burnley over the latter’s relegation from the Premier League in 2022. The Merseyside club said they were “surprised and angered” by the verdict from a Premier League independent disciplinary commission that Everton’s breaching of spending [...]

top_signals.title: Argan, Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.50 Per Common Share
top_signals.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) (“Argan” or the “Company”) today announces that its Board of Directors (the “Board”) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend in the amount of $0.50 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on July 31, 2026, to stockholders of record at the close of business on July 23, 2026. [...]
